ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows.
DEFENDANT GONZALO LAZALDE'S Motion For An Order; 1) Compelling Nationwide Legal, Llc To Provide Further Responses To Requests For Production, Set One, 2) Compelling Production Of Documents, And 3) Imposing Sanctions On Compelling Nationwide Legal, LLC IS DENIED AS TO R F P 16 AS OVERBROAD.
